description: Blacksmith provides hosted infrastructure and tooling to run GitHub Actions faster, including managed runners, caching, observability, and Testboxes for agent-driven CI runs against local changes. It integrates with GitHub organizations and offers a web app plus a CLI for testbox workflows.
summary: Blacksmith exposes a documented CLI for Testboxes and references a public HTTP API in its docs index, but I could not verify the API’s live OpenAPI document or authentication details from public docs; no GraphQL or MCP surface was found.
